src/main/java/com/bernardomg/association.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/main/java/com/bernardomg/association.why_exists: Java 21 introduces stricter checks for serialization; without @Serial, the compiler may warn or error depending on configuration, and it is required for correct semantic marking of serialization-related members.

src/main/java/com/bernardomg/association.general_idea: Import the new java.io.Serial class required for the annotation.
src/main/java/com/bernardomg/association.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is in the java.io package; without the import, the code will not compile.

src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/da.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/da.why_exists: Java 21 introduces stricter checks for serialization; without @Serial, the compiler may warn or error (depending on settings) that serialVersionUID is not properly annotated as a serial field.

src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/da.general_idea: Import the java.io.Serial class to support the new annotation.
src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/da.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is defined in java.io.Serial; without the import, the code will fail to compile with 'cannot find symbol' error.

src/test/java/com/bernardomg/association.general_idea: Replace iterator().next() with getFirst() to use the new List API introduced in Java 21.
src/test/java/com/bernardomg/association.why_exists: The method getFirst() does not exist on List in Java 17, causing a compilation error.

src/test/java/com/bernardomg/security/da.general_idea: Replace iterator-based retrieval of the first element with the List.getFirst() method introduced in Java 21.
src/test/java/com/bernardomg/security/da.why_exists: The method List.getFirst() does not exist in Java 17, causing a compilation error.

src/test/java/com/bernardomg/security/da.why_exists: The method getFirst() does not exist on List in Java 17, causing a compilation error if the code is compiled against the older JDK.
